steps.name: embeddings_strategy_chunk_model_idx
steps.statement: DEFINE INDEX embeddings_strategy_chunk_model_idx ON TABLE embeddings COLUMNS chunk_strategy, chunk_id, embedding_model UNIQUE;

steps.name: embeddings_strategy_model_idx
steps.statement: DEFINE INDEX embeddings_strategy_model_idx ON TABLE embeddings COLUMNS chunk_strategy, embedding_model;

steps.name: embeddings_text_hash_idx
steps.statement: DEFINE INDEX embeddings_text_hash_idx ON TABLE embeddings COLUMNS text_hash;

steps.name: embeddings_hnsw_idx
steps.statement: DEFINE INDEX embeddings_hnsw_idx ON TABLE embeddings COLUMNS embedding HNSW DIMENSION 1024 DIST COSINE EFC 64;
